mapper.select: SELECT * FROM critical_value_alert WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'ESCALATED') ORDER BY reported_time ASC

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", source_type AS "sourceType", source_id AS "sourceId", tech_name AS "techName", critical_items AS "criticalItems", severity AS "severity", status AS "status", reported_time AS "reportedTime", acknowledged_time AS "acknowledgedTime", handled_time AS "handledTime", handle_note AS "handleNote", escalated_time AS "escalatedTime", ack_deadline AS "ackDeadline", reporter_name AS "reporterName", doctor_name AS "doctorName" FROM critical_value_alert WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY reported_time ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'ESCALATED')) AS "pendingCount", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ESCALATED') AS "escalatedCount", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'HANDLED') AS "handledCount", COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (acknowledged_time - reported_time))) FILTER (WHERE acknowledged_time IS NOT NULL), 0) AS "avgAckSeconds", COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (handled_time - reported_time))) FILTER (WHERE handled_time IS NOT NULL), 0) AS "avgHandleSeconds" FROM critical_value_alert
